title: BSC Academy is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: BSC Academy is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
BSC Academy invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BSC Academy:
BSC Academy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSC Academy!
